title: mirabilis coahuilensis
intro: Mirabilis coahuilensis, also known as the Coahuila four o'clock, is a species of flowering plant in the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Mirabilis coahuilensis include reducing pain and swelling, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
